menu_options.credentials: Sign in with username and password

credentials.title: Dimplex Login
credentials.description: Sign in with your Dimplex account credentials (same as in the Dimplex app).

device.title: Select Device
device.description: Select your heat pump from the list or enter the Device ID manually.

token.title: Manual Token Entry
token.description: Enter your Dimplex device credentials. Find the Device ID in the app or API URL. Get the Refresh Token by intercepting the app's network traffic.

data_description.refresh_token: OAuth2 Refresh Token from Dimplex app

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthentication Required
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Choose a method to sign in again.

menu_options.reauth_credentials: Sign in with username and password

reauth_credentials.title: Sign In Again
reauth_credentials.description: Sign in again with your Dimplex account credentials.
